zh.lifeSummary: 當John Ian Mor Maconald於1425年出生在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾時，他的父親Donald Balloch MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glens18歲，母親Johanna O'Neill of Edenduffcarrick15歲。他於1461年10月與Sabina O'Neill在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1499年7月在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波享年74歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Ian Mor Maconald于1425年出生在苏格兰音巴內-爾时，他的父亲Donald Balloch MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glens18岁，母亲Johanna O'Neill of Edenduffcarrick15岁。他于1461年10月与Sabina O'Neill在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1499年7月在英国苏格兰艾丁波享年74岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Maconald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDonald
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Domhnaill ‘son of Domhnall’, a name derived from the Celtic elements domno- ‘world’ + val- ‘might, rule’. Donald is an Anglicized form (via Latin) of this personal name used in Scotland, though the surname is also widespread in Ireland. The name is equivalent to Irish McDonnell and McConnell , and to Manx Cannell .

History: This is the name of the largest and most disparate of the Scottish clans (Clan Donald), associated in particular with the Hebrides and claiming descent from Domhnall mac Raghnaill mac Somhairle, who lived in the late 12th century. From that time until 1493 the head of the clan was known as Lord (or King) of the Isles. The reigns of the Lords of the Isles were always stormy, often in conflict with the kings of Scotland, and peppered with disasters. After a series of defeats in the 1480s, Eoin Mac Dhomhnaill a Ìle (John Macdonald of Islay, Earl of Ross and Lord of the Isles) forfeited his lands, his power, and his title as Lord of the Isles in 1493 to King James IV of Scotland. By then, a branch of the family had settled in the Antrim Glens in Ireland and members moved between the southern Hebrides and Ireland throughout the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: John

nameMeanings.name: Ian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of John , also used extensively in the wider English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Mor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name from mór ‘large, great’. This was the commonest of all girls’ names in late medieval Ireland, and has continued in use in both Ireland and Scotland to the present day.

en.lifeSummary: When John Ian Mor Maconald was born in 1425, in Inverness-shire, Scotland, his father, Donald Balloch MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glens, was 18 and his mother, Johanna O'Neill of Edenduffcarrick, was 15. He married Sabina O'Neill in October 1461, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in July 1499, in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 74, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.Loch Gruinart, Islay, Scotland: Islay, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Ian Mor Maconald est né en 1425, à Inverness-shire, Écosse, son père, Donald Balloch MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glens, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Johanna O'Neill of Edenduffcarrick, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Sabina O'Neill en octobre 1461, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en juillet 1499, à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.Loch Gruinart, Islay, Scotland: Islay, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John Ian Mor Maconald 1425 in Inverness-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Donald Balloch MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glens 18 und seine Mutter Johanna O'Neill of Edenduffcarrick 15. Er hat im Oktober 1461 in Scotland Sabina O'Neill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb im Juli 1499 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Ian Mor Maconald è nato il nel 1425 nel Inverness-shire, Scotland, il suo padre, Donald Balloch MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glens, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Johanna O'Neill of Edenduffcarrick, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Sabina O'Neill nel ottobre 1461, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel luglio 1499, nel Edinburgh, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: John Ian Mor Maconaldが1425年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアで生まれた時，父Donald Balloch MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glensは18歳，母Johanna O'Neill of Edenduffcarrickは15歳であった。1461年10月にスコットランドでSabina O'Neillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1499年7月にイギリススコットランドエディンブルグで74歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.Loch Gruinart, Islay, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 이슬레이
ko.lifeSummary: John Ian Mor Maconald(이)가 1425년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Donald Balloch MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glens(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna O'Neill of Edenduffcarrick(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1461년 10월 스컷랜드에서 Sabina O'Neill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1499년 7월 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그h에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Ian Mor Maconald nasceu em 1425, em Inverness-shire, Scotland, seu pai, Donald Balloch MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glens, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Johanna O'Neill of Edenduffcarrick, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Sabina O'Neill em outubro de 1461, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. ru.Loch Gruinart, Islay, Scotland: ислеи, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Ian Mor Maconald родился в 1425 г. в местности инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Donald Balloch MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glens было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna O'Neill of Edenduffcarrick, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Sabina O'Neill октябрь 1461 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер июль 1499 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

Se casó con Sabina O'Neill en octubre de 1461, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos.
